label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what GM companies promise farmers they will benefit from. The options are A to D. Looking at the passage, I remember there was a part about GM companies telling farmers they'll save money on pesticides. The exact quote was: "GM companies tell farmers that they will make good profits by saving money on pesticides." So the promise is about using less chemicals (since pesticides are chemicals). The options are: B is "use of less chemicals," which matches that part. The other options don't fit. A is about green farming, which the passage says is a better alternative but not what GM
